def test_quixbugs_find_in_sorted():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    x = 7
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, x)

def test_quixbugs_find_in_sorted():

    x = 7
    result = find_in_sorted(arr, x)

attempts.test_code:
from source import find_in_sorted

def test_quixbugs_find_in_sorted():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 6, 7]
    x = 7
    expected_index = len(arr) - 1
    actual_index = find_in_sorted(arr, x)
    assert actual_index == expected_index, f"Expected index {expected_index} but got {actual_index}"
